title: Grade tracker
author: Prodipta Acharjee
prompt: Build summarize(scores): given a list of test scores (0-100), return [average, letter] where average is rounded to one decimal and letter is the grade for that average (90+ A, 80+ B, 70+ C, 60+ D, else F). An empty list returns [0.0, "F"]. This pulls together everything in cluster one - lists, numbers, and the question behind every if.
hints: Start with the average: sum(scores) / len(scores) - but guard the empty list first.
A chain of if / elif from 90 down, returning the letter, then return [avg, letter].
